ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the applicant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the applicant */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the applicant */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the applicant */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the applicant */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the applicant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "citizenship" TEXT /* Citizenship of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant submitting the application */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graduate program the application is for */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., submitted, under review, admitted, rejected) */,
  "application_fee_paid" INTEGER /* Whether the application fee has been paid */,
  "supporting_documents_submitted" INTEGER /* Whether supporting documents have been submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES graduate_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "graduate_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each graduate program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the graduate program */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department responsible for the program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program (in months) */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "tuition_fees" TEXT /* Tuition fees for the program */,
  "scholarships_available" INTEGER /* Whether scholarships are available for the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admissions_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the admission criteria */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graduate program the criteria apply to */,
  "gmat_min" INTEGER /* Minimum GMAT score required */,
  "gpa_min" REAL /* Minimum GPA required */,
  "work_experience_min" INTEGER /* Minimum years of work experience required */,
  "english_proficiency_test_min" TEXT /* Minimum English proficiency test score required (e.g., TOEFL, IELTS) */,
  "additional_requirements" TEXT /* Additional requirements for admission (e.g., letters of recommendation, personal statement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admissions_criteria_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES graduate_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score record */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated application */,
  "gmat" INTEGER /* GMAT score of the applicant */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the applicant */,
  "work_experience" INTEGER /* Years of work experience of the applicant */,
  "english_proficiency_test_score" TEXT /* English proficiency test score of the applicant (e.g., TOEFL, IELTS) */,
  "admitted" TEXT /* Admission outcome (e.g., yes, no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_scores_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., admissions, faculty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status log entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated application */,
  "status" TEXT /* New status of the application */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who changed the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_status_logs_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the interview is associated with */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the interview */,
  "interview_type" TEXT /* Type of interview (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "interview_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the interview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_interviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("interviewer_id") REFERENCES interviewers ("interviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviewers" (
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interviewer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the interviewer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the interviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the interviewer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the interviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the feedback pertains to */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  "provided_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_feedback_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission statistics record */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the graduate program */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the statistics */,
  "applications_received" INTEGER /* Number of applications received */,
  "admissions_granted" INTEGER /* Number of admissions granted */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Acceptance rate for the program (admissions granted / applications received) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_statistics_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES graduate_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicant_education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated applicant */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree earned (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's) */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  "university" TEXT /* University attended */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicant_education_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicant_work_experience" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work experience record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated applicant */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company name */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of employment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of employment */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Brief description of job responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applicant_work_experience_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)
